/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--no-undefined -shared  -o "AcidBadd_artefacts/Release/VST3/AcidBadd 303.vst3/Contents/x86_64-linux/AcidBadd 303.so" "CMakeFiles/AcidBadd_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AcidBadd_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AcidBadd_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AcidBadd_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AcidBadd_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AcidBadd_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AcidBadd_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/AcidBadd_VST3.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.cpp.o"  "AcidBadd_artefacts/Release/libAcidBadd 303_SharedCode.a" /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfontconfig.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libasound.so -lrt -ldl -lpthread
